title: nolana patula
intro: Nolana patula, also known as the Chilean evening primrose, is a flowering plant native to South America. It is a succulent perennial that belongs to the Solanaceae family. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. Nolana patula can be used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, which are said to offer health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving skin health, and supporting the immune system.
